subject: feat(polish): add loading/error/empty states, form list, mobile notice, nav links
body:
Phase 5 polish pass:
- FormListPage: loading spinner, error banner, empty state, and form list
  with status badges and dates. Sample data fallback for development.
- Builder header: added Responses link for quick navigation to submissions
- Builder: mobile viewport notice directing users to Preview for mobile testing
- All phases complete (0-5). Remaining work is backend integration.
